contentBlocks.original:
उदये ब्रह्मस्वरूपोऽयं मध्याह्नेतु महेश्वरम् ।
अस्तमाने स्वयं विष्णुं त्रयीमूर्तिं दिवाकरम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
udaye brahmasvarūpo'yaṃ madhyāhnetu maheśvaram .
astamāne svayaṃ viṣṇuṃ trayīmūrtiṃ divākaram ..
contentBlocks.translation: At sunrise, this (Sun) is in the form of Brahma; at noon indeed, (he becomes) Maheśvara; at sunset, he himself is Vishnu - (thus meditate on) the Sun who embodies the three divine forms (trimūrti).
contentBlocks.meanings: उदये (udaye) – at sunrise; ब्रह्मस्वरूपः अयम् (brahmasvarūpo 'yaṃ) – this one is in the form of Brahma (brahma:Brahma | svarūpaṃ:form); मध्याह्ने (madhyāhne) – at mid-noon; तु (tu) – indeed; महेश्वरम् (maheśvaram) – Maheshwara (Shiva); अस्तमाने (astamāne) – at sunset; स्वयं (svayaṃ) – himself; विष्णुं (viṣṇuṃ) – Vishnu; त्रयीमूर्तिं (trayīmūrtiṃ) – embodiment of three forms (trayī:three | mūrtiṃ:form); दिवाकरम् (divākaram) – Sun;
